R0223.title: API Object-Level Authorization Risk
R0223.definition: The API checks only the login state but not object ownership, allowing attackers to enumerate and access other users' resources.
R0223.description: The API checks only the login state but not object ownership, allowing attackers to enumerate and access other users' resources.
R0223.influence: May cause business abuse, data exposure, financial loss, compliance impact, or supply-chain propagation.
